CHECKLIST / MODULE 3 / LESSON 3: WEBINAR THANK YOU PAGE
WEBINAR THANK YOU PAGE CHECKLIST
The goal of your webinar thank you page is to give them what they need to
attend including:
✓ 	Date and time (multiple time zones, add to calendar link, countdown
timer)
✓ 	Text reminder option
✓ 	Facebook messenger reminder option
✓ 	Safe listing instructions
✓ 	Join link (for last-minute registrants)
✓ 	(optional) Watch replay of last webinar (for those who want instant
gratification)
✓ 	Add to Calendar Link
You can also use your webinar thank you page to sell them on attending by:
✓ 	Reasserting what they’ll get out of it
✓ 	Offering an instant bonus for registering
✓ 	Offering a bonus for attending
✓ 	Including credibility elements such as:
• 	Testimonials
• 	Information about the presenter(s)
• 	Related info
• 	A discount related but not competitive with your offer
Other factors for the thank you page include:
✓ 	Similar appearance to signup page (not the webinar company default
thank you page)
✓ 	Open and uncluttered design… use white space to your advantage
✓ 	Use video
✓ 	Exit pop up showing how to safelist your emails
✓ 	Testimonials (ideally of the webinar, otherwise for you personally, but NOT
for the product)
✓ 	Restatement of the transformation you’ll provide, promise to answer their
questions and “look forward to seeing you on the webinar”
